calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion & Motion For Prove-Up Hearing ***Reporter Fee Included***
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Delta Carriers, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:46 a.m.

David Weeks, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Benjamin Seeman, Senior Billing and Collection Manager for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Weeks and Seeman appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Delta Carriers, Inc.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Open Book Account, Reasonable Value, Account Stated and Breach of Contract was filed on March 1, 2021, and personally served on defendant Delta Carriers, Inc.'s Registered Agent of Process on March 17, 2021.
Default as to defendant Delta Carriers, Inc. was entered on May 6, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 8, 2021.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: KeepTruckin Initial Order Forms (35 pages).................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Customer Account Records for Delta Carriers, Inc. dated 3/13/2019..........ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Assignment of Delta Carriers Acct. from KeepTruckin to Creditors Trade.....ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant Delta Carriers, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,127.30.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,309.04.
Attorney Fees - $4,500.00.
Costs - $615.70.

Total - $47,552.04.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 11:04 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
